violations.text: Ceiling tile above the dishwasher area was observed stained and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
Ceiling tile above the dishwasher area was observed stained and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

Chicken tenders was observed held at 108-120 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
At time of inspection, walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer were in poor repair. Service has been called prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the milk cooler gaskets and the fan on the dish room floor have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023

Kitchen freezer was observed in poor repair. Per PIC, freezer is not maintaining freezing temperatures. Unit was out of service prior to inspection. All foods were placed in back freezer. Maintenance was on site during inspection for repairs. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
Light bulb was observed burnt out under kitchen hood. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
